response.justification: The candidate is a highly experienced senior/staff engineer with strong software craftsmanship credentials, but is a poor fit for this entry-level Junior Java Developer role. His career centers on TypeScript/Node.js and DLang with only peripheral Java exposure, his German is self-rated as basic while the role requires strong verbal and written German, and his 25+ years of experience make him significantly overqualified for a junior position, raising retention and compensation-fit concerns.
strengths: Completed computer science degree and deep software engineering fundamentals
Strong agile and quality practices (TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
Broad OOP experience across multiple languages with some Java exposure
concerns: German language skills only basic; role requires strong German communication
Severely overqualified senior profile for an entry-level junior role
Java is not a primary language; main expertise is TypeScript/Node.js and DLang

key_factors.factor: Solid engineering fundamentals and agile experience
